title: Product Liability
definition: Indemnifies the manufacturer if the consumption of his/her product causes harm or financial loss to a consumer. Who is this for? It's suitable for anybody who is at risk of financial loss due to damage to third party property or third party bodily injury.
benefits: Damage to or loss of their property Bodily injury including illness or death directly resulting in connection with the insured’s business
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
